_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_30_note: Session 30 (2026-05-28): ASML deep session (rotation; Computex events June 1-3 all still pending so queue items deferred). Key finding: TSMC A12 node (2029, most advanced disclosed node) also confirmed without High-NA EUV — extending prior A13 capture; TSMC's complete 2029 roadmap is now confirmed High-NA-free, challenging ASML's growth premium. TSMC Europe Technology Symposium (Amsterdam, May 28) — no new announcements beyond known roadmap. Phase 1b gate open (30%6=0): zero relevant podcast episodes found in last 14 days (second consecutive gate-open zero under %6 gate — watch for 3-session pattern). Phase 1c gate open (30%6=0): GEV (GE Vernova) scouted — AI datacenter power chokepoint, $163B backlog, sold out through 2028; watchlist/GEV.md created. ANET supplementary: EBO MSA (May 12) captured; price recovered to ~$158, Rec reverts to SELL/AVOID. No DCF run (all tickers <30 days from last run). next_deep_session advanced to NVDA (ASML rotation complete; Computex June 1 queue item still first in queue).

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) Jensen Huang GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei time — Session 30 ASML deep session completed; Computex not yet started. Session 31 priority: capture keynote output. Key watch: Vera Rubin NVL72 production volume guidance (confirmed at 200K-300K GPUs for 2H 2026 per pre-briefings; watch for official confirmation); Dynamo 1.0 GA details; N1X ARM laptop chip (MediaTek); CoWoS capacity commentary.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). NVLink Fusion showcase; Google TPU/MPU volume update; 4th hyperscaler (Meta MTIA) confirmation; Scorpio X vs. XConn head-to-head. Session 31/32: update MRVL entity after keynote.

Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT). Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X live demo (10-11am Taipei). Head-to-head vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch. Session 31/32: update ALAB entity after Computex outcome.

_event_queue_note: Session 30: ASML deep session completed (rotation). All 3 queue items still pending Computex events (June 1-3). After Computex cycle (June 1-5) processed, next rotation would be MU. next_deep_session set to NVDA to align with June 1 keynote priority.
